purpose: Bind the exact authority, state-carried-only questions, native-first selection discipline, mutation boundary, outputs, fail-closed effects, and owner-review stop before admitted implementation surfaces are compared for I03A.

mode_scope.sequence: I03A state_carried -> owner review -> I03B history_carried -> owner review -> I03C hybrid -> owner review

entry_authority.graph_worktree_required_state: clean before and after all I03A inspection or generic conformance

selection_discipline.native_adequacy_rule: A native surface is adequate only if the complete composition preserves one common non-private carrier, attributable joint constitution, selected dependence mode, mode-appropriate intervention, private-partition competitor, audit-only lineage, and all seven cells plus five controls without forbidden label or private-state bypass.
selection_discipline.producer_minimality_rule: A producer may supply only surfaces shown absent or inadequate by the admitted capability authority. Every producer-owned state, transition, read, write, intervention, and configuration identity must be explicit, and the producer may not compute both the pool and the later response through an inseparable shortcut.
selection_discipline.no_assumption_rule: Unresolved callable semantics, state ownership, causal reachability, or held-fixed feasibility blocks selection until resolved from admitted source or a generic non-candidate conformance check.

review_questions: Which complete bounded state-carried realization best satisfies the discriminator under the native-first selection discipline?
For every required surface, is native support adequate, inadequate, absent, external, or unsupported?
What exact minimal producer roles remain after native surfaces are composed?
How is pool_dependence_mode = state_carried instantiated without comparing or binding the later history-carried and hybrid profiles?
What exact state is the common carrier C_P, who owns it, and what proves non-private access?
Which operations implement U, audit_append, and V without allowing lineage labels to enter V?
Can at least two attributable source contributions jointly constitute one carrier while retaining audit lineage?
What intervention changes the common carrier or selected dependence while matching contributors, lineage, opportunity, and other causally held-fixed state?
What private-partition competitor preserves marginal contributions without one shared carrier?
How are all seven logical cells and five L02 controls realized without changing their stable identities?
For each OP-01 through OP-09, what state-carried qualitative relation, held-fixed variables, and fail-closed scientific effect are frozen?
Which numerical response, resolution, aggregation, comparator, threshold, seed, and machine-evaluation choices remain explicitly unresolved for I04?

allowed: Read only exact sources and public callables admitted by the I02R2 manifest at the admitted graph revision.
Inspect frozen RCAE authority artifacts and historical P2-I1 structure without importing P2-I1 evidence or conclusions.
Run only minimal generic conformance needed to resolve a source-level uncertainty, using the admitted checkout, no bytecode/cache writes in graph, and no P2-I2 candidate configuration.
Construct RCAE-only declarative state-carried realization, hypothesis, decision, validation, and report artifacts.
prohibited: Graph/PyGRC repository mutation, dependency installation, ambient-package substitution, or unadmitted source use.
Candidate, cell, control, matched-null, calibration, response-threshold, or scientific outcome execution.
Selection of numerical response, resolution, delta, aggregation, seeds, or machine pass rules owned by I04/I05.
Treating capability, source admission, generic conformance, or realization design as positive L02 evidence.
Inspecting, comparing, binding, or resolving the history-carried or hybrid realization profiles before their owner-reviewed sub-iterations.

required_outputs: explicit I03A owner-review stop without I03B or I04 authorization
failure_effects: Any missing or mismatched frozen authority blocks state-carried realization comparison until corrected under change control.
Any unresolved causal bypass, inaccessible common state carrier, inseparable producer shortcut, or unrealizable mandatory cell/control blocks I03A review-ready status.
A bounded state-carried missing-prerequisite disposition remains reviewable without opening I03B or I04.
No failed design or conformance check is a negative L02 result.

exit_gate.review_ready: P2-I2-I03A-REVIEW-READY; stop for owner review. The umbrella discriminator gate remains in progress, and I03B/I04 remain unauthorized.
exit_gate.earlier_stop: State-carried missing-prerequisite disposition retained for owner review; umbrella discriminator gate does not pass and later work remains unauthorized.
